modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues using Zoom add-in in Outlook 365

full_description_text:  
User trying to add Zoom to Outlook.  
They can't find the add-in option.  
Running on Windows and MacOS.  
Need help to get it working.
